Public dataset analysis - Neftel 2019¶

Preliminaries¶

In [1]:
import os
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import scipy
import matplotlib
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
In [2]:
data_folder = "data"
figure_folder = "figures"
In [3]:
sc.set_figure_params(frameon=False)
sc.settings.verbosity = 3
In [4]:
matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype'] = 42
matplotlib.rcParams['svg.fonttype'] = "none"

Read dataset¶

import original dimensionality reduction (PCA) and save it

In [5]:
df = pd.read_csv("data/SCP393/cluster/IDHwt.GBM.Hierarchy.SS2.txt", sep="\t", index_col=0)
In [6]:
df = df.drop("TYPE")
In [7]:
df
Out[7]:
X Y
NAME
MGH66-P08-H02 0.486872742221801 -0.609165952784187
MGH66-P07-C11 -0.91770501187587 -0.96876592013123
MGH66-P04-A01 -0.625322881716173 0.984189964189426
MGH66-P08-H10 -0.436381508046808 -0.866576070253559
MGH66-P08-E11 -0.646742647187236 -1.57148885003934
... ... ...
BT1187-P3-B05 1.77029298593016 -1.96559600563125
BT1187-P4-E11 1.60584361110153 -1.77911891444987
BT1187-P3-A02 1.89925790547496 -2.13354068256925
BT1187-P4-H05 1.6329469186637 1.02987799208593
BT1187-P4-A12 -1.99244926662054 -2.15974700792381

6863 rows × 2 columns

import count matrix and convert it to sparse format

In [8]:
ad_neftel = sc.read_text("data/SCP393/expression/IDHwtGBM.processed.SS2.logTPM.txt.gz").T
In [9]:
common_cells = list(set(df.index).intersection(set(ad_neftel.obs.index)))
In [10]:
ad_neftel = ad_neftel[common_cells, ].copy()
In [11]:
sparse_X = scipy.sparse.csr_matrix(ad_neftel.X)
ad_neftel.X = sparse_X
In [12]:
ad_neftel.obsm["X_hierarchy"] = df.loc[ad_neftel.obs.index, ["X", "Y"]].to_numpy().astype("float")

import cell annotation and store it in the anndata

In [13]:
df = pd.read_csv("data/SCP393/metadata/IDHwt.GBM.Metadata.SS2.txt", sep="\t", index_col=0)
ad_neftel.obs = df.loc[ad_neftel.obs.index]
In [14]:
ad_neftel
Out[14]:
AnnData object with n_obs × n_vars = 6576 × 23686
    obs: 'Sample', 'GBMType', 'CellAssignment', 'CrossSection', 'GenesExpressed', 'GeneticSubclone', 'MESlike2', 'MESlike1', 'AClike', 'OPClike', 'NPClike1', 'NPClike2', 'G1S', 'G2M'
    obsm: 'X_hierarchy'
In [15]:
sc.pl.embedding(ad_neftel, basis="X_hierarchy", color=['GBMType', 'Sample', 'CellAssignment', 'GeneticSubclone'],
                ncols=2, wspace=0.4, save="_neftel_2019_original_annotation.svg")

WARNING: saving figure to file figures/X_hierarchy_neftel_2019_original_annotation.svg

Import signatures from the GeoMX DEA¶

In [16]:
elongated_vs_rest = pd.read_excel(os.path.join(data_folder, "elongated_vs_rest_degs.xlsx"), index_col=0)
elongated_upreg_genes = elongated_vs_rest[(elongated_vs_rest.padj < 0.05) & (elongated_vs_rest.log2FoldChange > 0)].index.tolist()
len(elongated_upreg_genes)
Out[16]:
376
In [17]:
multipolar_vs_rest = pd.read_excel(os.path.join(data_folder, "multipolar_vs_rest_degs.xlsx"), index_col=0)
multipolar_upreg_genes = multipolar_vs_rest[(multipolar_vs_rest.padj < 0.05) & (multipolar_vs_rest.log2FoldChange > 0)].index.tolist()
len(multipolar_upreg_genes)
Out[17]:
199
In [18]:
nonpolar_vs_rest = pd.read_excel(os.path.join(data_folder, "nonpolar_vs_rest_degs.xlsx"), index_col=0)
nonpolar_dowreg_genes = nonpolar_vs_rest[(nonpolar_vs_rest.padj < 0.05) & (nonpolar_vs_rest.log2FoldChange < 0)].index.tolist()
len(nonpolar_dowreg_genes)
Out[18]:
376

Compute gene scores for the GeoMX DEGS¶

In [19]:
sc.tl.score_genes(ad_neftel, elongated_upreg_genes, score_name='elongated_upreg')

computing score 'elongated_upreg'
WARNING: genes are not in var_names and ignored: Index(['UPK3BL1', 'ATP5MC3', 'BUD23', 'TCEAL9', 'SEPTIN7', 'GATD1', 'H1-4',
       'RACK1', 'BEX3', 'REX1BD', 'H4C8', 'H2AZ1', 'ITPRID2', 'PLPP3',
       'NIPSNAP2', 'ATP5PD', 'HACD3', 'H2AZ2', 'SEPTIN11', 'SEPTIN2',
       'NECTIN3', 'ATP5F1A', 'H4C12', 'MICOS13', 'TLE5', 'H4C4', 'H2BC5'],
      dtype='object')
    finished: added
    'elongated_upreg', score of gene set (adata.obs).
    835 total control genes are used. (0:00:00)
In [20]:
sc.tl.score_genes(ad_neftel, multipolar_upreg_genes, score_name='multipolar_upreg')

computing score 'multipolar_upreg'
WARNING: genes are not in var_names and ignored: Index(['YARS1', 'SEPTIN7', 'H2AC20', 'H1-3', 'GATD1', 'H1-4', 'RACK1', 'H4C8',
       'ITPRID2', 'PLPP3', 'NIPSNAP2', 'ATP5PD', 'H4C12', 'MICOS13', 'SEM1',
       'KMT2C', 'SNHG32'],
      dtype='object')
    finished: added
    'multipolar_upreg', score of gene set (adata.obs).
    791 total control genes are used. (0:00:00)
In [21]:
sc.tl.score_genes(ad_neftel, nonpolar_dowreg_genes, score_name='nonpolar_downreg')

computing score 'nonpolar_downreg'
WARNING: genes are not in var_names and ignored: Index(['UPK3BL1', 'ATP5MC3', 'BUD23', 'TCEAL9', 'SEPTIN7', 'GATD1', 'H1-4',
       'RACK1', 'BEX3', 'REX1BD', 'H4C8', 'H2AZ1', 'ITPRID2', 'PLPP3',
       'NIPSNAP2', 'ATP5PD', 'HACD3', 'H2AZ2', 'SEPTIN11', 'SEPTIN2',

In [22]:
sc.pl.embedding(ad_neftel, basis="X_hierarchy", color=['elongated_upreg', 'multipolar_upreg', 'nonpolar_downreg'], 
                ncols=1, wspace=0.4, vmin="p10", vmax="p90", save="_neftel_2019_geomx_signatures.svg")

WARNING: saving figure to file figures/X_hierarchy_neftel_2019_geomx_signatures.svg

SOX+ NES+ cells signature from bulk RNAseq¶

In [23]:
degs = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(data_folder, "deseq2_toptable.sox2_nes_positive_vs_negative.txt"), comment="#", sep="\t")
In [24]:

In [25]:
sox2_pos_nes_pos_signature = degs[(degs['log2FoldChange'] > 0) & (degs['padj'] < 0.1)].gene_name.tolist()
In [26]:
len(sox2_pos_nes_pos_signature)
Out[26]:
36
In [28]:
sc.tl.score_genes(ad_neftel, sox2_pos_nes_pos_signature, score_name='sox2_pos_nes_pos_score')
